name: recoil_app_activate_existing_instance_absent
description: RecoilApp::ActivateExistingInstance returns success when no prior Recoil window is found for the registered class name.
known_limits: The smoke covers the absent-existing-window path by using a test-only class name and verifies the caller-visible return value.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for the Win32 FindWindow/ShowWindow/SetForegroundWindow call shape.
